markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 8. Special Plates [5000 - 5024]
##### § 5001.5

The director may enter into agreements or arrangements with motor vehicle departments in other states to provide for a reciprocal exchange of regular series license plates for the purposes of and under the conditions provided in Sections 5001 and 5003.

*(Amended by Stats. 1982, Ch. 576, Sec. 2.)*

subsections.text: The director may enter into agreements or arrangements with motor vehicle departments in other states to provide for a reciprocal exchange of regular series license plates for the purposes of and under the conditions provided in Sections 5001 and 5003.
